title: User cannot login after password reset
description: Customer reports being locked out after using forgot password link. They reset password but still cannot login.
resolution: Cleared session cache and regenerated auth token. User advised to clear browser cache.

title: Payment failing at checkout
description: Customer unable to complete purchase. Card keeps getting declined despite sufficient funds.
resolution: Issue was payment gateway timeout. Asked customer to retry in different browser. Payment succeeded.

title: Not receiving email notifications
description: User stopped receiving order confirmation emails about a week ago. Checked spam folder but nothing there.
resolution: Found user had accidentally unsubscribed from transactional emails. Re-enabled notifications.
